E8 Funded trader testimonials & EARNINGS reviews

Just purchased a 150k crypto account. The process was super quick and easy, and support has been great with me. So far the experience has been great, I havent made it to the payout stage yet, but we will see once i get there. but so far everything has been great.

Gabriel Gonzalez

Crypto Trader Signature

US

Today I have received my 3rd payout from e8 markets. I'm trading on a 150k account with them, model 1 account, (they offer signature plan now), I can always rely on this company to pay me out without trying to deny anyones payout because they didn't follow a made up rule. The rules are stated clearly on their website and they are super easy to follow, this is unlike other prop firms with shady rules and unfair payout denials. I'm writing this review because they are an excellent company and am looking forward to continue doing business with them in the future. I highly recommend e8 markets.

Emre Altunisik

Funded Futures Trader

USA

Hello E8 community. Here comes the day of my first payment in cooperation with E8. Everything went great and easy. Thank you for your correct and patient attitude towards us. I would especially like to thank Jerry for his support, who helped me resolve the issue with payment. I recommend the company E8. Perhaps the best company today in this niche. All the best and profitable deals.

Vitalii B

Forex Trader E8 One

Ireland

Website Ownership

This website is subject to the internal rules and policies of Digital Renaissance LLC, a company incorporated under the laws of Puerto Rico. All content, products, and services offered through this site are provided under the management and supervision of Digital Renaissance LLC.

Company Details

E8 Funding LLC
E8 Funding is a technology and education company incorporated under the laws of the United States, located at: 4101 McEwen Rd #205, Dallas, TX 75244.
E8 Funding provides access to trading accounts within a simulated environment. These accounts are for educational use only, evaluating users’ trading proficiency and risk management skills. At no time are users asked to deposit capital for investment purposes, nor do they risk their own funds. Program outcomes depend solely on individual performance and adherence to the stated rules and objectives.
E8 Funding solely operates the following trading platforms: Tradelocker, CTrader, and Match Trade.
E8 Markets Ltd
E8 Markets Ltd is a legal entity incorporated under the laws of Saint Lucia, with registration number 2025-00347, located at: Ground Floor, The Sotheby Building, Rodney Village, Rodney Bay, Gros-Islet, Saint Lucia, LC06 201.
E8 Markets Ltd operates the following trading platforms: Metaquotes “MT5” .
Risk warning-E8 Markets Ltd: E8 Markets offers simulated trading accounts,however, we are ought to advise that, engagement with live trading in financial markets involves *substantial risk* and is not suitable for all individuals. CFDs are complex instruments due to their speculative nature.

Educational Use Only

All content provided by E8 Funding LLC and its affiliates is intended strictly for informational and educational purposes. The content and services on www.e8markets.com do not constitute investment advice or personal recommendations.
E8 Funding provides access to trading accounts within a simulated environment. These accounts are for educational use only, evaluating users’ trading proficiency and risk management skills. At no time are users asked to deposit capital for investment purposes, nor do they risk their own funds. Program outcomes depend solely on individual performance and adherence to the stated rules and objectives.

Live Trading Clarification

In the event a user chooses to engage in live market trading, such activity is conducted entirely outside the scope of E8 Funding LLC, and exclusively through independently managed brokerage accounts. E8 Funding LLC does not operate as a broker, accept client deposits, or facilitate live market transactions.

Hypothetical Performance Disclosure – CFTC Rule 4.41

Simulated or hypothetical trading results have inherent limitations. Unlike actual performance records:

They do not reflect real trading activity.
They may under- or over-compensate for market factors such as liquidity.
They are designed with the benefit of hindsight.

No representation is being made that any account will, or is likely to, achieve profits or losses similar to those displayed or referenced.

Evaluation Disclaimer on services of E8 Funding LLC

The evaluation program's customer pass rate from January 1, 2023, to March 1, 2024, was 17.7%, for those who traded at least once during this period and obtained an E8 Trader Account. The Evaluation and E8 Trader accounts aim to simulate trading under real market conditions as closely as possible, including commissions and spreads. However, the evaluation is challenging and may not be suitable for individuals with limited or no trading experience.

Customer Compensation Disclosure on the services of E8 Funding LLC

Compensation presented for customer trades should be regarded as hypothetical. Such performances are not indicative of, and should not be expected to replicate, a live trading account. E8 Trader Accounts represent simulated trading environments. Testimonials and payout information may not be representative of other clients' or customers' experiences and should not be viewed as guarantees of future performance or success.

Jurisdictional Restrictions

E8 Markets operates the following trading platforms: MT5. Access to the MT5 platform is restricted to US citizens and to anyone where such usage would violate local regulations.
E8 Funding LLC does not offer services to residents of the following jurisdictions: Cuba, Syria, Iran, Lebanon, Iraq, Yemen, North Korea, Russia, Ukraine, and Belarus .
All payments made via the E8 platform are for access to educational software and services, and are non-refundable unless unused.
Access to MetaTrader “MT5” services to U.S. residents and citizens in jurisdictions where such use would violate applicable laws or regulations is denied. In addition, any related content on this website is not intended for the aforementioned categories of citizens.

Contact & Legal Resources

For further information, please refer to the following:

Terms of Use
Privacy Policy
Risk Disclosures

Or contact: support@e8markets.com

*Effective Date: 08/20/2025*
